summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaintSal Labs platform - Business DNA onboarding, metering engine, credit system, and Stripe checkout. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All DNA wizard steps, SAL HQ Dashboard, and Credit Limit Modals working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 65 integrations instead of 88+ mentioned in spec - this is the actual count in metering.py

test_credentials: No auth required for tested endpoints. Supabase keys in backend/.env. GHL uses pit-24654b55 token. Stripe uses live key sk_live_51RzHyp...
seed_data_creation: None - Business DNA uses in-memory cache for anonymous users
context_for_next_testing_agent: SaintSal Labs platform fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/health (Supabase public=true, admin=true), /api/ghl/stats (ok=true), /api/user/business-dna (POST/GET), /api/billing/credit-topup (returns Stripe URL), /api/checkout/create-session (subscription checkout), /api/metering/* (dashboard, log, check-access, tier-info, integrations, compute-levels). Frontend: DNA onboarding wizard has 5 steps with data-testid attributes, SAL HQ Dashboard at navigate('my-sal'), Credit Limit Modal via showCreditModal('credits_exhausted'|'model_upgrade', data).

backend: POST /api/user/business-dna - Saves complete Business DNA profile with all fields (200)
GET /api/user/business-dna - Returns saved profile or empty default (200)
POST /api/billing/credit-topup - Returns valid Stripe checkout URL for $5-$250 amounts (200)
POST /api/checkout/create-session - Returns Stripe subscription checkout URL (200)
GET /api/metering/dashboard - Returns tier info, compute stats, action breakdown (200)
POST /api/metering/log - Logs usage and returns updated stats (200)
POST /api/metering/check-access - Validates feature access against tier (200/403)
GET /api/metering/tier-info - Returns all 5 tiers with Stripe IDs (200)
frontend: DNA Onboarding Wizard - 5 steps with progress dots
Step 1 (Personal Info) - first_name, last_name, email, phone fields with data-testid
Step 2 (Business Type) - Entity type selector reveals company fields when LLC/Corp selected
Step 3 (Business Details) - Industry, years, employees, revenue, address fields
Step 4 (Goals & Interests) - 10 selectable interest tiles with data-testid
Step 5 (Your Brand) - Tagline and bio fields with LAUNCH MY SAL button
SAL HQ Dashboard - Profile card with avatar, name, company, tagline, tags
Quick Actions row - 8 navigation shortcuts (Search, Builder, GHL Hub, Career, Real Estate, Finance, Cards, Settings)
Credit Limit Modal (credits_exhausted) - Top-up grid ($5-$250) with PURCHASE button
Credit Limit Modal (model_upgrade) - Tier-specific upgrade CTA
Credit top-up PURCHASE button - Calls /api/billing/credit-topup and gets Stripe URL
